title: List marketplace listing images in predictable order

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Marketplace listing images are not presented in a predictable order.

  • In the public marketplace, images are displayed in the order they were submitted: 1-2-3-n.
  • When accessing the marketplace when you’re signed in, images are displayed in reverse order: n-3-2-1.

There is a particular order to marketing images. To tell a story, to match up visually, etc. etc.

Since you’re introducing revenue sharing, this is in monday’s interest to fix, as well…

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @reinier,

I replied to a similar comment from you a few minutes ago. Would you be able to please fill this form so that our team can take a look into it?

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Little update: the situation improved somewhat at the end of August.

The image order is now consistent across the public, authed, and admin listings. However, it is still the reverse from what was submitted using the listing update form in the developer centre. I finally got back to our support request, so we’ll see if/how the team will resolve this.

We’ll continue submitting our first image as the last image as well
